reason: PRD specifies memory.js with search(query, topK) and add() using agentic-store + agentic-embed. The file src/runtime/memory.js does not exist. The underlying primitives (store/index.js for KV, runtime/embed.js for vector embedding) are implemented and tested. A developer task is needed to create the memory.js module that composes these two primitives into a semantic memory API.
proposedChange: Create task for developer to implement src/runtime/memory.js with: add(text, metadata?) → embed + store, search(query, topK=5) → embed query + vector similarity search. Dependencies: store/index.js, runtime/embed.js (both already working).
